## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling change
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m py_compile src/vpn_tools/*.py src/vpn_tools/ui/*.py mullvad_speed_test.py mullvad_coordinates.py`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Manual sanity check performed (if applicable)

## Security and Privacy

- [ ] No sensitive data added to logs or repository
- [ ] Runtime artifacts remain under `runtime/`
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed/updated if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `docs/CHANGELOG.md` (`[Unreleased]`)
- [ ] Updated docs/README when behavior changed
- [ ] Ready for review
